## What this changes and why

## Test plan

- [ ] `python3 -m pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated a regression test for this change (bug fixes must include one — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Ran the affected command(s) by hand at least once, not just through the test suite

## Checklist

- [ ] No new third-party dependency added, or its justification is in this PR's description
- [ ] CLI, SDK, and MCP tool surface stayed behaviorally consistent (if this touches core logic used by more than one of them)
